programme.desc: Coverage from the 10th stage of the Grand Tour race, a 166.6km mountain route from Aurillac to Le Lioran, as the race returns after a rest day. This stage last year saw Great Britain's Simon Yates claim his one and only stage victory as he finished clear of Dutch cyclist Thymen Arensman and Ireland's Ben Healy. Healy's third place finish at this point moved him top of the general classification, a place above eventual winner Tadej Pogacar.
